infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Luminous Health uses the camera to take photos of your meals and nutrition labels.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Luminous Health needs access to your photo library so you can choose meal photos and label images from your gallery.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Luminous Health connects to your computer on the local network to sync your account and nutrition data during development.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Luminous Health uses the microphone only when you record video with the camera.

en.NSCameraUsageDescription: Luminous Health uses the camera to take photos of your meals and nutrition labels.
en.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Luminous Health needs access to your photo library so you can choose meal photos and label images from your gallery.
en.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Luminous Health connects to your computer on the local network to sync your account and nutrition data during development.
en.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Luminous Health uses the microphone only when you record video with the camera.

tr.NSCameraUsageDescription: Luminous Health, öğün ve beslenme etiketi fotoğrafları çekmek için kamerayı kullanır.
tr.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Luminous Health, galeriden öğün veya etiket görseli seçebilmen için fotoğraflarına erişir.
tr.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Luminous Health, geliştirme sırasında hesap ve beslenme verilerinizi eşitlemek için bilgisayarınıza yerel ağ üzerinden bağlanır.
tr.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Luminous Health, kamerayla video kaydı sırasında yalnızca mikrofonu kullanır.

plugins.cameraPermission: Luminous Health uses the camera to take photos of your meals and nutrition labels.
plugins.photosPermission: Luminous Health needs access to your photos so you can choose meal photos and label images from your gallery.
